description: A component value measuring the impact of idea age (i.e., how recent or stale the contributing ideas are) on the signal
A component showing the contribution from the historical performance of analysts who submitted ideas for the stock; higher values indicate more credible input
Cross-sectional ranking score from 1 to 10 for the stock within the region on a given day, with 10 being most bullish and 1 most bearish
A percentile rank (1–100) showing how well the Indicator signal has historically predicted price movement for the stock over the past 12 months in backtesting
A composite score representing aggregated sell-side idea sentiment for the stock, combining decay, contributor skill, proximity to earnings, and idea volume/direction information
A component reflecting how close the stock is to an earnings event, adjusting the signal according to proximity to earnings
